name: Christian Lindberg
abstract: Christian Lindberg (born 15 February 1958) is a Swedish trombonist, conductor and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Turré
about_quotes.evidence: nowadays we’ve got Christian Lindberg, Joe Alessi and others too that are really virtuosos.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Turré interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 29, 2021
